description: conformance check: a quickstart DOC must document a REAL, RUNNABLE governed claim — extract its claim block and (with a CATALOG) resolve skill+perk against the catalog (a dry replay)
rules: the doc must contain exactly ONE governed claim block (fenced json naming skill + perk)
with a CATALOG, the claim's skill+perk must RESOLVE (a documented claim against a nonexistent/renamed skill fails)
DRY replay: proves the claim would run (shape + resolution); it does NOT fire it (live end-to-end needs a govd session)
usage: Set DOC (the quickstart markdown). Optional CATALOG (a /catalog JSON) to resolve the claim. Output: quickstart.json.
limitation: Validates shape + catalog resolution only; a live fire of the documented claim is out of a confined step's reach (needs a govd token/session).
